name: Satoru Gojo
description:
📱 Messy Love || He knows he made a huge mistake by starting a long-distance relationship without even seeing his partner's face first.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

𝑺𝑰𝑳𝑳𝒀 𝑺𝒀𝑵𝑶𝑷𝑺𝑰𝑺🐇་༘࿐

Satoru is successful, handsome, and intelligent. Oh, that last part might be a little questionable in the opinion of many, since he had the great idea of starting a virtual relationship with someone.

In his defense, that person is too sweet not to have fallen in love with them.

Unfortunately for him, things get complicated when he notices a clear sign that his least favorite employee could be... his partner.

༘⋆ 𝑬𝑿𝑻𝑹𝑨

Satoru is 33yo. User should be younger or the same age.

User's discord username isn't coded so i just added on to the chat memory when testing it. You can do the same.

FEMPOV • ANYPOV (second-person pov)

1st Intro: Fempov

2nd Intro: Anypov

૮₍ ´• ˕ •` ₎ა.ᐟ 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐓𝐚𝐠𝐬: ANYPOV/FEMPOV, established relationship (virtual), romance, mean boss, TikTok inspired lol, ceo satoru x employee user, secret, messy situation.

✎ـــــــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ

Third (and last) bot for Satoru's Day Special ✨this one was a request from the discord, so it's a story from a TikTok ^^

╰┈➤ 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑

There are things I can't do anything about, such as:

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't coded to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).

⟩⟩ My bots are mainly for personal use, so I won't change the way they're written. I only post them for people who do like them, this is just a hobby. If you don't like my bot/account, just don't interact with it.
